name: Alibaba Cloud DataWorks MCP Server
what_it_does: Official MCP server from Alibaba Cloud (aliyun org) for DataWorks — Alibaba's enterprise big data development and governance platform. Enables AI agents to manage DataWorks projects, workflows, data pipelines, and ETL jobs programmatically through Alibaba Cloud's DataWorks API.
use_cases: Managing DataWorks data development projects from orchestration agents
Triggering and monitoring ETL pipelines from automation agents
Querying data lineage and governance metadata from analysis agents
Integrating DataWorks workflows into AI-driven data engineering pipelines
not_for: Teams not using Alibaba Cloud DataWorks (platform-specific)
Non-Alibaba Cloud data engineering stacks (AWS Glue, Azure Data Factory)
Personal data projects — DataWorks is enterprise-scale
best_when: An enterprise data engineering team on Alibaba Cloud wants AI agents to automate DataWorks pipeline management, monitoring, and orchestration tasks.
avoid_when: You use AWS, Azure, GCP, or open-source data stacks — DataWorks is Alibaba Cloud only. Also consider data residency: DataWorks data stays in CN/AP regions.

auth.notes: Alibaba Cloud AccessKey ID and AccessKey Secret required. Standard Alibaba Cloud IAM authentication. Use RAM roles for least-privilege access.

pricing.free_tier_limits: DataWorks free tier available; paid tiers for enterprise features and higher compute
pricing.paid_tiers: DataWorks Basic, Standard, Professional tiers with increasing compute and feature access
pricing.notes: Alibaba Cloud account required. MCP server itself is free open source. DataWorks usage costs apply.

performance.rate_limits: Alibaba Cloud API rate limits apply; varies by API tier

known_agent_gotchas: DataWorks API documentation is primarily in Chinese — review translated docs carefully
Data residency: DataWorks data lives in Alibaba Cloud regions (CN/AP) — check compliance requirements
AccessKey credentials are long-lived — use RAM roles with minimal permissions for agent use
Official from aliyun org but documentation depth may be limited for non-Chinese enterprise users
agent_readiness.security_notes: Official Alibaba Cloud MCP. HTTPS to Alibaba Cloud APIs. Use RAM role-based access control. Data processed by Alibaba Cloud — review data residency for regulatory compliance.

security_score_components.security_notes: HTTPS to Alibaba Cloud. RAM roles for least privilege. Data in Alibaba Cloud regions. Official from aliyun org.
